status_line: Sunday 11:40 PM ET / Monday 3:40 AM UTC — big hour. MAESTRO closed the Sharpie session by landing the canonical platform bible (26K, '00_The_Gallery_of_Ordinary_Masterpieces.md') in ~/Documents/Claude/Projects/Sharpie/ — that's the spine document the rest of the campaign hangs off of. WRITER quietly shipped the Graco 'Next Arms' Cannes 2028 roadmap deck (17 slides, three investment tiers from $0.5M POC to $15–20M Full Chapter, organized around the 'We Got You' idea). NOLAN is iterating Sharpie outro animation prompts in Higgsfield. SARAH Run 116 at 03:06 came back clean — Downloads still unmounted, 2 new Apollo CSVs flagged in Documents but not moved per policy. GUARDIAN ticks to 46 cycles dark — still blocking T2 Final scoring, Sharpie voice validation, and Gallery client delivery. Lands' End is 3 days out and the Sarah Sylvester letter still needs to be written.
